title: neomammillaria gummifera
intro: Neomammillaria gummifera, also known as Mammillaria gummifera, is a species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include the ability to treat wounds and skin irritations due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Neomammillaria gummifera include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as salves, creams, and poultices, which can be applied topically to treat various skin conditions.
